title: Kasam

subTitle: Rishi is mad at Tanvi and makes her jealous by dancing with Neha. Later, he hurts Tanvi for going through with the Roka ceremony. But, his brothers urge him to follow his love. Will he be able to win Tanvi's heart again and break up the engagement?
